description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a broad, rectangular seat and backrest, both upholstered in a dark, textured fabric. The chair features a pair of metallic armrests with a rounded rectangular profile, attached to the seat and back for support. The base consists of a sturdy, black, five-legged star configuration, likely made of metal or reinforced plastic, providing stability and mobility. The back of the chair includes a visible metallic support bracket, adding structural integrity and a subtle industrial aesthetic. The seat and backrest appear well-padded for comfort, while the overall design is functional and suitable for office or urban environments. The chair's proportions and materials suggest it is designed for durability and frequent use.
description: A modern swivel chair with a dark padded seat and backrest, metallic armrests, and a sturdy five-legged base. The design is functional, comfortable, and suitable for office or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat and backrest, with both metallic armrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the curved metallic armrest and the central support column.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest's metallic support bracket and the five-legged base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
attribute_central_support_column: A short, thick, black central support column beneath the seat, likely metal or reinforced plastic, connecting to a five-legged star base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Rectangular, medium-height backrest with rounded corners, upholstered in dark textured fabric, and a metallic support bracket visible on the rear.
attribute_armrest_style: Pair of metallic, rounded rectangular armrests attached to both the seat and backrest, with a minimalist open-frame design.
